SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-08-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-08-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. PLAINTIFF VICTOR RAVENEL IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF IS ASSISTED BY A FRENCH LANGUAGE INTERPRETER MOLLY SMITH CERTIFICATION # 700686. DEFENDANT PREMIUM AUTO IS PRESENT, APPEARING IS SHODY AWADALLAH. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-08-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAVENEL, VICTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PREMIUM AUTO OWNED BY MARSAM GROUP INC $6,523.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,573.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
